target.label: Epic 5: UX Mockup Fidelity — Close Visual Drift

rationale: P0 coverage is 100% (36/36), P1 coverage is 100% (2/2), and overall coverage is 100% (38/38). All 38 acceptance criteria across 4 stories have FULL coverage with real, exercising tests (135 Epic 5-specific tests across 23 files, 853 total tests passing, 0 skipped). The decision is CONCERNS rather than PASS because of 4 documented weaknesses: (1) AC-7 (5.4) full-width artifact list pane is missing the no-scrollbar class and has no test — both an implementation and test coverage gap within an AC that otherwise has coverage; (2) AC-5 (5.3) branded placeholder not wired up in implementation (test correctly verifies default only); (3) NFR-5.4 returned PASS WITH CONCERNS with 2 Medium findings; (4) AC-10 (5.2) tests limited to zero-conversation case (jsdom limitation). None of these are blockers — all ACs have real test coverage and the suite passes cleanly. The concerns should be addressed in follow-up work.
